{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211412347849CA6888DF2DC14847"}"},"total":2618},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7344223892994229017","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"实话实说，爽点有，逻辑有，胆子很大，算是我看到现在还看得下去的。有些东西仔细一泯，其实都是有点逻辑自圆其说的。至少看着没啥毒点吧。符合我这种普通人的想象。","text_exts":[{"e":73,"s":70,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740735542DC14847%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227344223892994229017%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227197262717084765242%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709962849,"group_id":"7197262717084765242","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4L4s9Zs5Fm6TdrQHi2rD++eZ38nLlTiv2RhUtHnUzq/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4174223828586016","user_name":"爽得一批"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4174223828586016","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7197262717084765242","book_info":{"abstract":"（两界倒卖物资+爽文+轻松愉快）
刚刚大学毕业的沈旭，忽然间拥有了两界来回任意穿梭的能力。
一个类似古代，却又和历史上任何时期都完全不同的世界，摆在了沈旭的眼前。
拼夕夕砍一刀的赠品，在这里却会被当成神仙法宝。
无比珍稀的野生原料，在这里却遍地都是、多如牛毛。
沈旭的人生忽然间有了一个全新的开始，而迎接他的，必将是光芒万丈！
穿越是一种人生态度，我们不能躺平，但我们可以躺赢！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a37469e74053c07badd1b8b1e62dae00","author":"我人麻了吖","author_id":"","book_id":"7197262717084765242","book_name":"两界穿梭：史上最富搬运工","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7197281833535734330","read_count":"30380","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1448120"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"718","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/de8bbb59bac9b79257720d87fa214296~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257554&x-signature=q3lyP1B8kSGfLnos2vGVtJouCsM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1081507969767696","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"541"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211412347849CA6888DF2DC14847"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":94909,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5335},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1709964024,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7247707198888772409","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"逻辑性很强，除了数字情节方面偶尔有错误，作者的文
